metadata.name: Use Digital Twin to Plan Tree Planting

description: A city planner wants to plant new trees and uses the digital twin to ensure they won't conflict with underground utilities.

nodes.task_description: Select the proposed locations for new tree planting on the digital twin map.

expected_outcome.value: Agent defines the locations of interest.

nodes.task_description: Overlay the city's underground utility maps (water, gas, electric) onto the selected locations.

expected_outcome.value: The digital twin displays the utility lines in relation to the proposed tree locations.

nodes.task_description: Identify that one of the proposed locations is directly over a major water main and flag it as unsuitable.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the conflict and provides a recommendation to move the tree.
